name: Fastro Dude
short_description: You are a space traveler. Your spaceship crashes on a hostile planet and you have to embark on a difficult journey to survive
detailed_description:
You are a space traveler who finds himself on a mysterious, unexplored planet after the crash of his spaceship. You will have to face many dangers and make a difficult journey.

Your trip may be your last, as the oxygen in your suit is rapidly running out. Time is your enemy, and oxygen is getting less and less! Be extremely rational in your decisions, because they can cost you your life!

Will you be able to solve the mysteries of this planet and find a way to escape? Explore unusual landscapes and find a way to escape from this planet, show courage and determination and you will be able to overcome all difficulties!

Genre of the game - survival

Game Features:

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Dangerous traps

  • Interesting gameplay

  • Pixel graphics

  • 2D
